zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas II de Featherstone於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東時，他的父親Sir Thomas I de Featherstone36歲，母親.31歲。他於大約1297年與Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1310年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas II de Featherstone于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東时，他的父亲Sir Thomas I de Featherstone36岁，母亲.31岁。他于大约1297年与Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1310年在他的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Featherstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Staffordshire, Yorkshire, and Northumberland, which are so called from Old English fetherstān ‘tetralith’, a prehistoric structure consisting of three upright stones capped with a headstone (from Old English fe(o)ther- ‘four’ + stān ‘stone’).

variants.name: Featherson
meanings: English: variant of Featherstone with loss of -t-.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas II de Featherstone was born about 1275, in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas I de Featherstone, was 36 and his mother, ., was 31. He married Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux about 1297, in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1310, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas II de Featherstone est né environ 1275, à Featherstone, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas I de Featherstone, avait 36 ans et sa mère, ., avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux environ 1297, à Featherstone, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1310, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas II de Featherstone um 1275 in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas I de Featherstone 36 und seine Mutter . 31. Er hat um 1297 in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas II de Featherstone è nato il circa 1275 nel Featherstone, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas I de Featherstone, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, ., aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux circa 1297, nel Featherstone, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1310, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas II de Featherstoneが約1275年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエアスエルストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas I de Featherstoneは36歳，母.は31歳であった。約1297年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエアスエルストーンでMariotta Ainsworth de Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1310年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas II de Featherstone(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 피더스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas I de Featherstone(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 .(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 피더스톤에서 Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1310년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas II de Featherstone nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas I de Featherstone, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, ., tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux aproximadamente 1297, em Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1310, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas II de Featherstone родился около 1275 г. в местности фитирстоун, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas I de Featherstone было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали ., 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux около 1297 г. в местности фитирстоун, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1310 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas II de Featherstone nació aproximadamente 1275, en Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas I de Featherstone, tenía 36 años y su mamá, ., tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux aproximadamente 1297, en Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1310, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
